tip: [Eusan Nation] Great holes secretly are digged where earth's pores ought to suffice, and things have learnt to walk that ought to crawl.

[Eusan Nation] A Replika is a biomechanical humanoid maufactured by the Eusan Nation. The process to making them is tighly guarded secret but everyone knows that neural patterns from select citizens are used
[Eusan Nation] Almost all the Replika types are named after birds in German
[Eusan Nation] At some point during the war, Vineta was blockaded and bombarded by the Imperial Fleet of the Eusan Empire. As a result of the fighting, Vineta was turned into a water flooded world.
[Eusan Nation] Your rationmarks are the only thing that keeps you from starving. Too bad you dont have much anyway.

[Eusan Nation] The Penrose Program is the flagship deep space exploration program of the Eusan Nation. Hundreds of these small exploration craft have been sent out into the void to find new worlds and planets to expand the Eusan Nation.

[Eusan Nation] Buyan, the 1st planet of the star system was home to the Imperial Palace and by the end of the war, the last bastion of the Imperial military. Now its home to a nascent colonial effort by the Nation.

[Eusan Nation] Kitezh was the 3rd planet of the star system and for over 100 years the breadbasket of the entire star system. The war between the Nation and the Empire destroyed the fragile ecosystem and the red deserts seem to be reclaiming the planet back.
[Eusan Nation] Rotfront is the main colonial effort by the Nation. Most Vinetans evacuated have been sent here to ease the burden off an overtaxed Vineta
[Eusan Nation] Leng is the outermost planet and the most remote settlement in the star system. Those who live there either don't have a choice or were unfourtunate to be born there.
[Eusan Nation] Heimat, the captial of the Nation. The planet orbits a gas giant in which at certain times the view of the massive rings is said to be beautiful.

[Eusan Nation] Vineta was the original center of the star system where most people lived. Wars have destroyed much of it, drowning the planet in water and forcing the Nation to relocate people offworld.
[Eusan Nation] Do Replikas have feet? Maybe.
